cmQuestionPicPRSB: Stores image file references attached to questions within PRSB care plan or risk assessment records. Related to careplanTakenPRSB.
cmReasonStatus: Links status change reasons to specific statuses for client or carer side workflows. Related to cmFutureStatusReason and status tables.
cmRecruitmentSource: Lookup table of named recruitment sources used to track how carers were hired. Referenced by carer.
cmRecurrComments: Stores comments added to specific recurring schedule instances on a given date. Related to adminRecurr, client, and carer.
cmRouteDistances: Caches calculated route distances between location pairs to avoid repeated API calls. Related to company and location.
cmSchedulePermissions: Defines granular admin and scheduling permission flags for individual carer/admin users. Related to carer.
cmScheduleRuns: Defines named schedule runs (e.g. morning, afternoon) with colour coding and branch assignment. Related to company and location.
cmShiftDetails: Defines named shift templates with start/end times, job type, colour, and ward/day assignment. Related to area and client.
cmSignOffUpdated: Records sign-off events linked to updated care plan instances. Related to cmFormsPlansUpdated and cmFormsSignOff.
cmSkinAssessments: Stores wound and skin integrity assessment records for clients, including wound dimensions, appearance, pain, dressing, and treatment. Related to client, cmSkinTypes, cmSkinClassifications, cmSkinGrades, and cmSkinIntensities.
cmSkinClassifications: Lookup table of wound/skin classification names per company/location. Referenced by cmSkinAssessments.
cmSkinFiles: Stores image or file attachments for skin/wound assessments. Related to cmSkinAssessments.
cmSkinGrades: Lookup table of wound grading names per company/location. Referenced by cmSkinAssessments.
cmSkinIntensities: Lookup table of pain intensity levels with colour coding and ordering. Referenced by cmSkinAssessments.
cmSkinTypes: Lookup table of wound/skin assessment types with an optional reference image. Referenced by cmSkinAssessments.
cmSpeed: Logs page load duration per user and location for performance monitoring. Related to carer and location.
cmTabCarer: Defines custom profile tabs for the carer profile page, with access control per role and optional PIN. Related to company and location.
cmTabCarerComments: Stores comments posted within a carer custom tab. Related to carer and cmTabCarer.
cmTabClient: Defines custom profile tabs for the client profile page, with access control per role and optional PIN. Related to company and location.
cmTabClientComments: Stores comments posted within a client custom tab. Related to client and cmTabClient.
cmTabFileUpload: Stores files uploaded within client or carer profile tabs. Related to client and carer.
cmTableUpdate: Audit log recording individual field-level changes made to any table row, capturing old and new values. Related to client and carer.
cmTimesheetPhoto: Stores photos captured by carers during clock-in or clock-out events. Related to carer.
cmTraining: Defines named training resources (with URLs) organised under sections, visible to admin and/or carer sides. Related to cmTrainingSection.
cmTrainingSection: Defines named sections for grouping training materials with tags and visibility flags. Referenced by cmTraining.
cmTransportType: Lookup table of transport modes (e.g. car, walk, bike) used to categorise travel expenses and time. Referenced by travel and pay calculations.
cmTravelSettings: Stores travel calculation configuration per company/location, including metric, deductions, rates per transport mode, NMW rules, and split shift thresholds. Related to company and location.
cmUserBio: Stores biographical profile text for clients, carers, or invoicees. Related to client and carer.
cmWageRates: Stores national minimum wage rates by age band over effective date ranges. Used for NMW compliance checks.
cmWardDetails: Associates carers and clients with named wards within an area. Related to carer, client, and area.
cmWardRequiredStaff: Records the required number of staff per position and shift for a given ward/area on a specific date. Related to area and cmShiftDetails.
cmWeeklyWorkingSummary: Stores weekly work summaries per carer including total days, hours, holiday taken, and event count. Related to carer.
cmWorkweekNoShow: Logs dates when a carer did not work a contracted workweek slot. Related to carer and cmCarerWorkweek.
company: Defines top-level company records with contact details, custom terminology labels, feature flags, and system-wide configuration. Central table referenced by nearly all operational tables.
companyAccess: Stores feature access flags for companies, such as Irish postcode lookup. Related to company.
company_invoicing_details: Stores internal invoicing metadata for companies including account manager, SLA dates, and invoice breakdown preferences. Related to company.
compliance: Records compliance events such as incidents, complaints, and safeguarding cases, with priority, status, outcome, and regulatory notification tracking. Related to client and carer.
complianceHistory: Audit history of changes to compliance record status, priority, progress, and assigned person. Related to compliance.
compliancelog: Stores free-text log notes added to compliance records over time. Related to compliance.
complianceSignOff: Stores digital signatures captured during compliance record sign-off. Related to compliance.
compliance_associated: Links compliance records to associated carers, clients, or other entities for notification and view tracking. Related to compliance.
compliance_category: Lookup table of compliance category names per company/location. Referenced by compliance.
compliance_conclusion: Lookup table of conclusion options for compliance investigations. Referenced by compliance.
compliance_details_history: Audit log of changes to the details field of a compliance record. Related to compliance.
compliance_enquiry: Lookup table of enquiry types used in compliance records. Referenced by compliance.
compliance_issue: Defines compliance issue types with prefixes, mandatory carer/client flags, email notification settings, and day-count alerts. Referenced by compliance.
compliance_issue_permission: Controls visibility of specific fields within a compliance issue type. Related to compliance_issue.
compliance_issue_subtask: Defines ordered subtask templates associated with a compliance issue type. Referenced by compliance_issue_subtask_items.
compliance_issue_subtask_items: Tracks the status and progress of subtask instances within a specific compliance record. Related to compliance and compliance_issue_subtask.
compliance_issue_subtask_status: Defines status options for compliance subtask items. Referenced by compliance_issue_subtask_items.
compliance_level_harm: Lookup table of harm level classifications for compliance records. Referenced by compliance.
compliance_notes: Stores free-text notes attached to compliance records. Related to compliance.
compliance_notifier: Lookup table of notifier types used in compliance records. Referenced by compliance.
compliance_perpetrator: Lookup table of alleged perpetrator types for safeguarding compliance records. Referenced by compliance.
compliance_reason: Lookup table of reason codes for compliance records. Referenced by compliance.
compliance_subject_history: Audit log of changes to the subject field of a compliance record. Related to compliance.
compliance_upload: Stores file attachments linked to compliance records or subtask items. Related to compliance.
contactLink: Links contact records together or to shared contact groups, supporting cross-referenced contact relationships. Related to contacts and contactsSaved.
contacts: Stores contact records for clients and carers including next-of-kin, invoicees, GPs, and professionals, with FHIR clinical role fields. Related to client and carer.
contactsFull: Historical snapshot or extended copy of contacts records, preserved for audit or migration purposes. Related to client and carer.
contactsJ: Secondary snapshot or join-table copy of contacts records. Related to client and carer.
contactsPending: Staging table for contact records awaiting approval before being added to the main contacts table. Mirrors the contacts table structure.
contactsPowerOfAttorney: Stores power of attorney records for clients or carers, including acting status, restrictions, and legal details. Related to client and carer.
contactsSaved: Stores reusable shared contact records that can be linked to multiple clients or carers, with billing and invoice template settings. Referenced by contacts.
contactsVisible: Controls which contact types are visible within a company. Related to contactType.
contacts_import: Staging table for importing legacy contact data from an external system. Standalone import table.
contactType: Lookup table defining named contact relationship types applicable to client or carer profiles. Referenced by contacts.
contingencyPlanPRSB: Stores PRSB-format contingency and advance statement plans for clients, including trigger factors, coping strategies, and responsible persons. Related to careplanTakenPRSB and client.
cqcCategories: Defines CQC governance categories with quality statements, linked to display tabs. Related to cqcTabs.
cqcCategoryPages: Defines named pages linked to CQC governance categories, pointing to specific system pages. Related to cqcCategories.
cqcTabs: Defines top-level CQC governance tabs with review dates and notes. Referenced by cqcCategories.
cqcTabsHistory: Audit history of changes to CQC tab notes and review dates. Related to cqcTabs.
crmCallLog: Logs call interactions with CRM contacts, including subject, type, date, and time. Related to contacts.
crmContactBio: Stores biographical text for CRM contacts, with optional shared group context. Related to contacts.
crmContactsContact: Stores individual sub-contacts associated with a CRM contact record. Related to contacts.
crmContactsContactType: Lookup table of contact sub-types used within CRM contact records. Referenced by crmContactsContact.
crmDocuments: Stores file uploads attached to CRM contact records. Related to crmRecords.
crmMeetingNotes: Records meeting notes including attendees, date, time, and notes for CRM contacts. Related to contacts.
crmRecords: Stores general interaction records (calls, emails, meetings) for CRM contacts with type and date. Related to contacts.
crmRecordType: Lookup table of CRM interaction record types. Referenced by crmRecords.
crmSharedContactGroup: Defines shared contact group organisations that can be linked across multiple contacts. Referenced by contactsSaved and contacts.
crmSharedContactGroupType: Lookup table of types for shared contact groups. Referenced by crmSharedContactGroup.
cronRunRecords: Tracks the last run timestamps of scheduled background cron scripts for monitoring. Standalone.
crontabLog: Logs start and finish timestamps for cron script executions per company/location. Standalone audit table.
crumlinUnpublished: Stores draft or unpublished recurring schedules pending publication for a specific client-carer pair. Related to client and carer.
CSVInvoice: Stores summarised invoice data exported to CSV format, including pay/billing totals and council reference. Standalone export table.
databasePerformance: Logs individual slow or monitored database query executions with timing, SQL, and call context for performance analysis. Related to company and location.
databasePerformanceConfig: Configuration table controlling which performance tiers (slow, fast, etc.) are actively logged. Standalone.
datatablesCustom: Stores per-user column visibility and layout preferences for data tables on specific pages. Related to company and location.
defaultNames: Stores customised display label names for standard tabs and sections within a company/location. Related to company and location.
defaultNamesHistory: Audit log of changes to custom display label names. Related to company and location.
deleted: Central audit log recording soft-deletion events across all tables, capturing which table and row was deleted and by whom. Referenced by foreign keys in several tables.
deleted_medicationResults: Archive of deleted medication administration results, preserving the original record with deletion reason. Related to client.
documents: Stores file documents uploaded for clients or carers, with folder organisation and tag support. Related to client and carer.
documentsFolders: Defines folder structures for organising documents, supporting nesting, app visibility, and password protection. Related to client and carer.
documentUploadTags: Lookup table of named tags applicable to document uploads, with client/carer side flags. Referenced by documents.
document_duplicate_queue: Tracks queued document duplication jobs by type and quantity. Standalone queue table.
email: Logs all outbound emails with delivery tracking (sent, delivered, opened, bounced, complaint) via AWS SES. Related to carer, client, and various record types.
emailQueue: Queues pending outbound emails for processing, linked to medication or task result alerts. Related to client and carer.
emailSendGrid: Logs emails sent via SendGrid with category and permission context. Related to carer and client.
